hooks.command: pwsh -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command '$i = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($i.tool_input.file_path -like "*.cs") { $r = [System.IO.Path]::GetRelativePath((Get-Location).Path, $i.tool_input.file_path).Replace("\","/"); dotnet format Sergin.slnx --include $r --no-restore -v quiet }' 2>$null
